page.content: In the context of ongoing market fluctuations and changing consumer preferences, Unilever has demonstrated resilience through its strategic focus on core product categories. This report highlights the same-store sales growth metrics across key segments, including Food & Beverage and Personal Care, which are critical to understanding the company's performance in a competitive landscape. The data presented in the accompanying table illustrates the percentage growth in sales from established locations, providing insights into revenue stability and customer retention.

lines.text: In the context of ongoing market fluctuations and changing consumer preferences, Unilever has demonstrated resilience
through its strategic focus on core product categories. This report highlights the same-store sales growth metrics across key
segments, including Food & Beverage and Personal Care, which are critical to understanding the company's performance in a
competitive landscape. The data presented in the accompanying table illustrates the percentage growth in sales from established
locations, providing insights into revenue stability and customer retention.

page.content: Notably, the Total Growth (%) column reflects the aggregated performance across all categories, emphasizing Unilever's ability to adapt to market demands while maintaining operational efficiency. Recent trends indicate a shift toward sustainable and health-conscious products, which have positively influenced sales dynamics within the Food & Beverage segment. Moreover, the Personal Care division continues to benefit from increased consumer investment in hygiene and self-care products, further contributing to the overall growth narrative. As Unilever navigates the challenges posed by economic uncertainties and supply chain disruptions, these same-store sales growth figures serve as a critical indicator of the company's operational effectiveness and market positioning moving forward.
